calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-08-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Petitioner: Thi Thu Yen Nguyen, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Adam Nguyen, and with Vietnamese Interpreter, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Adam Tran.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-04-2005 Reset To Feb-08-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Petitioner: Thu Yeb Thi Nguyen, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for and with the Minor: Adam Nguyen, and with Vietnameses Interpreter: Leanna Dang.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor is continued to Feb. 8, 2005 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
For Petitioner to file an AMENDED PETITION, submit proof of service to the Minor's father of the new hearing date or Order dispensing with notice.
